UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a registered user's profile information. Authentication details are managed externally.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for identification.

role.description: The role of the user within the application.

totalClicks.description: Total number of referral clicks received by this user (if affiliate).

totalEarnings.description: Total commission earned by this user.

affiliateStatus.description: Approval status for the affiliate program.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Represents a physical address associated with a user or an order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Address entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this address belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Address)

addressLine1.description: The primary line of the street address.

addressLine2.description: The secondary line of the street address (e.g., apartment, suite).

state.description: The state or province of the address.

postalCode.description: The postal or ZIP code of the address.

isDefaultShipping.description: Indicates if this is the user's default shipping address.

isDefaultBilling.description: Indicates if this is the user's default billing address.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a classification for products, such as 'Indoor Plants' or 'Seeds'.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the category (e.g., Indoor, Outdoor, Seeds, Bonsai).

description.description: A brief description of the category.

imageUrl.description: URL for an image representing the category.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single plant product available for purchase in the e-commerce store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

name.description: The name of the plant product.

description.description: A detailed description of the plant, potentially AI-generated.

price.description: The standard selling price of the product.

discountPrice.description: The discounted selling price of the product, if applicable.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this product belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N Product)

stock.description: The current quantity of the product available in stock.

images.description: An array of URLs for product images (URI format), with the primary image listed first.

careGuide.description: Instructions and tips for caring for the plant.

averageRating.description: The calculated average rating based on user reviews.

totalReviews.description: The total number of reviews for this product.

isFeatured.description: Indicates if the product is featured on the homepage or special sections.

isAvailable.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the catalog.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product information was last updated.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a user's review and rating for a specific product.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product being reviewed. (Relationship: Product 1:N Review)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who submitted the review. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Review)

rating.description: The rating given by the user, typically on a scale of 1 to 5.

comment.description: The textual comment provided by the user in their review.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the review was submitted.

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents a single product item added to a user's shopping cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this cart item. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N CartItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product added to the cart. (Relationship: Product 1:N CartItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in the cart.

addedAt.description: Timestamp when the item was added to the cart.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a completed customer order, containing details about the purchase and shipping.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who placed the order. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Order)

shippingAddressId.description: Reference to the Address used for shipping. (Relationship: Address 1:N Order)

billingAddressId.description: Reference to the Address used for billing. Can be the same as shipping address. (Relationship: Address 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including shipping and taxes.

status.description: The current status of the order.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for the order (e.g., Credit Card, UPI, PayPal).

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number for the shipment, if available.

referrerUserId.description: Optional reference to the UserProfile (who is an affiliate) that referred this order.

rejectedSelfReferral.description: Audit flag: true if commission was rejected because the buyer was the affiliate.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order status or details were last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product item included in a customer order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product purchased. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

productName.description: The name of the product at the time of purchase (snapshot).

quantity.description: The quantity of the product purchased in this order item.

unitPrice.description: The unit price of the product at the time of purchase (snapshot).

subtotal.description: The subtotal for this order item (quantity * unitPrice).

AffiliateProfile.title: AffiliateProfile
AffiliateProfile.description: Stores information about a user who has applied for or been approved for the affiliate program.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AffiliateProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile associated with this affiliate.

applicationDate.description: Timestamp when the affiliate application was submitted.

approvalStatus.description: The current approval status of the affiliate application.

bankAccountName.description: The name on the bank account for payout.

bankAccountNumber.description: The bank account number for payouts.

bankIfscCode.description: The IFSC code for the bank account.

upiId.description: The UPI ID for alternative payouts.

referralCode.description: A unique code assigned to the affiliate for generating referral links.

AffiliateClick.title: AffiliateClick
AffiliateClick.description: Represents a single click on an affiliate referral link.

affiliateId.description: The UID of the affiliate who owns the referral link.

userAgent.description: The browser user agent string of the visitor.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the click was recorded.

authenticatedUserId.description: UID of the user who clicked, if logged in.

Payout.title: Payout
Payout.description: Records a payment transaction made to an affiliate for their accumulated commissions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payout entity.

affiliateId.description: Reference to the AffiliateProfile receiving the payout.

payoutAmount.description: The total monetary amount paid out in this transaction.

payoutDate.description: The date and time when the payout was processed.

status.description: The status of the payout transaction.

transactionId.description: An optional external transaction ID from the payment processor.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.
